PartingPlane.Method: Dominant bounding-box axis with center-plane placement.
Warnings: Automatic parting plane is preliminary and based only on dominant bounding-box axis.

Rule.Description: Checks whether the supplied minimum wall thickness meets the supplied preliminary recommendation.

Checks.Message: Minimum wall thickness 1.5 mm meets preliminary recommendation 1.2 mm.

Rule.Description: Checks whether cooling clearance is greater than half of the cooling channel diameter.

Checks.Message: Cooling clearance 10 mm is greater than required preliminary minimum 3 mm.

Rule.Description: Checks whether lattice beam radius is less than half of lattice cell size.

Checks.Message: Lattice beam radius 1 mm is less than preliminary maximum 5 mm.

Rule.Description: Checks whether ejector pin diameter is positive and reportable.

Checks.Message: Ejector pin diameter 4 mm is positive.
